name.title: Workspace name
name.lead: Shown in the sidebar, breadcrumbs, and workspace switcher.

icon.title: Workspace icon
icon.lead: Shown in the sidebar and workspace switcher. PNG, JPG, or WebP up to 2 MB.
icon.footer: Click the icon to upload or replace it.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.lead: Permanently remove this workspace and all of its data. This action is not reversible, so please continue with caution.

deleteDialog.title: Delete workspace
deleteDialog.descriptionSuffix: and its data in this demo. Type the workspace URL to confirm.
deleteDialog.slugInvalid: Enter the workspace URL exactly as shown.

toast.invalidImageType: Use a PNG, JPG, or WebP image.
toast.imageTooLarge: Image must be 2 MB or smaller.
toast.readImageFailed: Could not read the image. Please try again.
